## Checklist
- [ ] `mvn test` passes locally
- [ ] No debug `System.out.println` / leftover `TODO` comments
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials in the diff
- [ ] If schema changed: Flyway migration added
- [ ] If public API changed: tested manually in browser / Postman
